description_long: This is a tall, rectangular shelving unit with a dark brown top and base, and a light-colored body. The front features four open shelves above two cabinet doors, each with a handle, providing both open and closed storage options. The sides are plain and unadorned, emphasizing the functional design. The back is flat and featureless, suitable for placement against a wall. The handles on the lower doors are simple and metallic, contrasting with the otherwise wooden construction. The overall appearance is utilitarian, making it suitable for urban environments such as offices, garages, or public waiting areas.
description: A tall, rectangular shelving unit with four open shelves and two lower cabinet doors, featuring a dark brown top and base with a light-colored body.
description_view_0: Front view showing four open shelves and two cabinet doors with handles.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain, flat side panel and the dark brown top and base.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a flat, featureless back panel and the dark brown top and base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with a plain, flat side panel.
